serviceName: cyRespond to a property possession claim
feedback: cyThis is a new service – your feedback (opens in new tab) will help us to improve it.

contactUsDetailsEmailIntroSuffix: cyto get your local court’s email address.
contactUsDetailsEmailHelp: cyIf you do not know the name of your local court, select the ‘Money’ category and then the ‘Housing’ category to find it.

date.futureDate: cyDate must be in the past
date.pastDate: cyDate must be in the future
date.yearMustBeSameOrAfter: cyThe year must be the same as or after {{minYear}}

documentUpload.wrongFileTypeDocStore: cyThe selected file must be a DOC/DOT/DOCX/DOTX, XLS/XLT/XLA/XLSX/XLTX/XLSB, PPT/POT/PPS/PPA/PPTX/POTX/PPSX, PDF, TXT/RTF/CSV, JPG/JPEG, PNG, BMP, TIF/TIFF
documentUpload.fileTooLargeDocStore: cyThe selected file must be smaller than {{maxSize}}MB
documentUpload.uploadFailed: cyThe file could not be uploaded – try again
documentUpload.fileDeleteFailed: cyThe file could not be removed – try again

404.title: cyPage not found
404.paragraph: cyThis could be because you’ve followed a broken or outdated link, or because there’s an error on our site. Use the browser back button to go to the previous page.
